calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: E1 prior context discrimination -- Context-B fix (num_hazards=1, revised thresholds)
items.notes: Fixes EXQ-181 Context-B=0 bug. Two changes: (1) num_hazards=1 for spatial gradient; (2) thresholds revised for proxy-field range: Context A > 0.7, Context B < 0.33. Dry-run clean. Full 100-ep run needed for context coverage.
